title: The Merchant's Lost Wagon
target: recover the salt-merchant's wagon from the brigands camped at the Crow's Ford

contributions.line: Marek, with his soldier's brawn, struggles to crack the iron strongbox's lock, but the rust is tough.
Roselle, nimble and cautious, tries to slip past the brigand sentry, but he hears her and alerts the camp.

outcomeNarrative: The brigands catch wind of the intrusion, forcing the mercs into a hasty retreat, leaving the salt-merchant's wagon behind.
